name: Matteo Lane
bio: Matteo Lane is an American comedian, singer, and illustrator from the Chicago area, known for fast, sharp material on gay life, his Italian and Mexican family, and pop culture, often punctuated by his operatic singing voice. A trained opera singer and oil painter before comedy, he built a large following through sold-out theaters, viral clips, and self-released specials on YouTube. He released his first major streaming special, The Al Dente Special, in 2025 and published the cookbook Your Pasta Sucks.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at open mics in Chicago
Featured in New Faces at the Just for Laughs festival
Appears in Netflix's The Comedy Lineup
Releases self-produced special The Advice Special on YouTube
Releases Hair Plugs and Heartache; sells out the Chicago Theatre
Releases The Al Dente Special; publishes cookbook Your Pasta Sucks

accolades: The Advocate Icons, Innovators, and Disruptors (2018)
Sold-out shows at Carnegie Hall and the Kennedy Center
First major streaming special, The Al Dente Special (2025)
